name: ExtensionEvidence_CopyrightLabel
title: R5: Copyright holder and year(s) (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `Evidence.copyrightLabel` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`Evidence.copyrightLabel` 0..1 `string`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `Evidence.copyrightLabel` 0..1 `string`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `Evidence.copyrightLabel` has a context of Evidence based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `Evidence`.
Element `Evidence.copyrightLabel` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.comment:
Element `Evidence.copyrightLabel` has a context of Evidence based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `Evidence`.
Element `Evidence.copyrightLabel` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
The (c) symbol should NOT be included in this string. It will be added by software when rendering the notation. Full details about licensing, restrictions, warrantees, etc. goes in the more general 'copyright' element.

element.definition: A short string (<50 characters), suitable for inclusion in a page footer that identifies the copyright holder, effective period, and optionally whether rights are resctricted. (e.g. 'All rights reserved', 'Some rights reserved').
element.comment: The (c) symbol should NOT be included in this string. It will be added by software when rendering the notation. Full details about licensing, restrictions, warrantees, etc. goes in the more general 'copyright' element.
